name: Incubus

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Poison; Exhaustion, Grappled, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Prone, Restrained, Unconscious

traits.name: Air Form
traits.text: The stalker can enter an enemy’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Invisibility
traits.text: The stalker has the Invisible condition.

text:
# Incubus

*Large Elemental, Neutral*

### Actions

**Wind Swipe.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Force damage.

**Vortex.** Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, one Large or smaller creature in the stalker’s space. Failure: 7 (1d8 + 3) Thunder damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Until the grapple ends, the target can’t cast spells with a Verbal component and takes 7 (2d6) Thunder damage at the start of each of the stalker’s turns.
